title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Cracker, Luffy, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have zero chance of coming out of this Vic- tortious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: knock once, and it splits in two.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: knock again, and it becomes three.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll only interrupt Mama's CERE- Monty... over my dead body!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "No, I'm the sweet command arms CR A GKER." BOUNTY 860,000,000 bb

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, breathe! We can't have you fighting all out!! That's not what we're here for!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, as soon as we get out of this forest, our top priority is to find and get to Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A desperate clash with one of the "Yonkou's" officers!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 18 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
